action.reasoning: Observation: Four training attempts have all segfaulted (exit 139), even with num_workers=0, suggesting a fundamental issue with PyG DataLoader or memory pressure when loading full datasets. Test_env succeeded with 128-graph subset, so code is functional on small data. Analysis: Full dataset loading may exceed RAM (48GB) when combined with DataLoader batching, or PyG's DataLoader has hidden multiprocessing (pin_memory threads). Decision: Eliminate DataLoader completely; use manual batching via PyG's Batch.from_data_list. Train on a small subset (5000 graphs) for 2 epochs to confirm pipeline works and obtain baseline AP. Also fix model to handle edge features properly in all GINE layers (project edge_attr to hidden_dim). Then submit eval to get first score and measure iteration time.
